description: CompositionDark cinder, calf-length PES soccer training pants made of polyester and lycra, with self-print side panels, broad smocking waist and ruched endsWash careHand wash or machine washStylish and comfortable, these dark cinder PES training pants from adidas run up to the calves and end in a ruched Fit. The broad, smocked waistband ensures it fits well and supports the abdomen too, while the self-print side panels give it a stylish edge. Made of Climalite fabric, this polyester and lycra mix material ensures ample breathability and elasticity, enabling easy movement even when indulging in a heavy round of exercises.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
